title: Sindhu stuns world No. 5 Han Ye, enters Japan Open quarterfinals
indian_angle: India's premier shuttler PV Sindhu secured a significant victory against a higher-ranked opponent, advancing deep into a Super 750 tournament.
summary: PV Sindhu defeated world No. 5 Han Ye of China in straight games (21-16, 21-14) in just 35 minutes to reach the quarterfinals of the Japan Open 2026.

title: Eligibility for World Junior Championships 2026 announced
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has released the player eligibility criteria for the BWF World Junior Championships 2026, guiding aspiring Indian junior shuttlers.
summary: BAI has issued a circular detailing the player eligibility requirements for selection to the BWF World Junior Championships 2026, scheduled to be held in Cairo, Egypt.

title: Bhubaneswar U-19 Ranking Tournament now World Junior selection event
indian_angle: The Bhubaneswar U-19 Ranking Tournament has been designated as the selection event for the BWF World Junior Championships 2026, crucial for India's junior talent.
summary: Following a postponement, the Bhubaneswar U-19 Ranking Tournament will now serve as the official selection tournament for the BWF World Junior Championships 2026.

title: Delhi World Championships: Badminton needs Gen Z, Gen Alpha fans
indian_angle: With India hosting the BWF World Championships in Delhi, there's a focus on attracting younger audiences to ensure the sport's future popularity in the country.
summary: A discussion piece on the need for badminton to engage younger generations, Gen Z and Gen Alpha, as India prepares to host the BWF World Championships in Delhi.

title: 3x15 scoring system implemented for Indian domestic tournaments
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has adopted the 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in junior categories, impacting future Indian talent.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has announced the implementation of the 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for U-13, U-15, and U-17 age groups, debuting at Ernakulam.
